title: Implement lichen_tdma_compute_slot(const uint8_t eui64[8], uint32_t epoch, uint8_t num_slots)
description: Per spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:76: fnv1a32(EUI64 XOR epoch) % num_slots. Use new hash_32. Add to link.h and link_ctx.c. Integrate EUI64/epoch params. Match ccp_tdma.json exactly where possible.
